title: Predicting the SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic IPOs — With Dick Costolo
summary: Dick Costolo, ex-CEO of Twitter, discusses the prospects and timing of potential IPOs for SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic, examining their business models, competitive positioning, and capital requirements. The podcast explores how AI company valuations and platform narratives compare, and where the AI IPO market may face challenges.
